info.name: PunchCraft API
info.description: REST API for PunchCraft — a boxing ecosystem platform for profiling, verifying, and connecting fighters, gyms, coaches, referees/judges, promoters, matchmakers, and fans.

body.raw:
{
  "fullName": "Kwame Mensah",
  "ringName": "The Accra Lion",
  "nationality": "Ghanaian",
  "weightClass": "lightweight",
  "stance": "orthodox",
  "heightCm": 175,
  "reachCm": 178,
  "record": { "wins": 10, "losses": 2, "draws": 0, "kos": 7 },
  "bio": "Professional boxer from Accra.",
  "region": "Greater Accra",
  "city": "Accra",
  "linkedGymId": "{{gymId}}",
  "linkedCoachId": "{{coachId}}"
}
body.description: Note: linkedGymId and linkedCoachId are optional. Pass ?forUserId=<userId> if caller is super_admin to create on behalf of another user.

request.description: Only returns approved + searchable profiles.
Owner can see own draft. Public can only see approved+public profiles.

body.description: linkedGymId and linkedCoachId are optional (fighter can be a free agent). Changing linkedGymId automatically removes the fighter from the old gym's roster and adds them to the new one.

request.description: Owner pulls an approved profile back to draft so it can be edited and resubmitted.

formdata.description: Image file to upload to Cloudinary

request.description: Uploads file to Cloudinary and sets profileImageUrl on the profile. Caller must own the profile.

formdata.description: Cover image file to upload to Cloudinary

request.description: Uploads file to Cloudinary and sets coverImageUrl on the profile. Caller must own the profile.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Accra Boxing Club",
  "address": "12 Ring Road, Accra",
  "location": { "country": "Ghana", "region": "Greater Accra", "city": "Accra" },
  "services": ["boxing", "fitness"],
  "facilities": ["ring", "gym", "locker rooms"]
}

request.description: Owner pulls an approved profile back to draft so it can be edited and resubmitted.
Bidirectional: also adds this gym to the coach's linkedGymIds.
Bidirectional: also removes this gym from the coach's linkedGymIds.

Bidirectional: also sets the fighter's linkedGymId to this gym. Returns 409 if the fighter already belongs to a different gym — the fighter must update their own profile (PATCH /profiles/fighters/{id}) to change gyms.
Bidirectional: also clears the fighter's linkedGymId if it points to this gym.

body.raw:
{
  "fullName": "Emmanuel Tetteh",
  "bio": "20 years coaching experience.",
  "experienceSummary": "Trained 15 professional fighters.",
  "specialties": ["footwork", "combinations"],
  "linkedGymIds": ["{{gymId}}"]
}

request.description: Owner pulls an approved profile back to draft so it can be edited and resubmitted.
Owner pulls an approved profile back to draft so it can be edited and resubmitted.
Owner pulls an approved profile back to draft so it can be edited and resubmitted.
Owner pulls an approved profile back to draft so it can be edited and resubmitted.
Owner pulls an approved profile back to draft so it can be edited and resubmitted.
Uploads file to Cloudinary and records in mediaAssets collection.
Deletes from Cloudinary and removes from mediaAssets collection.
Submit a verification document for admin review. fileUrl should come from a prior /media/upload call.
Admin only. Returns all documents with reviewStatus=pending, oldest first.
status must be 'approved' or 'rejected'.
Admin only. Returns all reports sorted newest first.
status must be 'reviewed' or 'dismissed'.
Pass the favorite document id (from GET /favorites), not the profileId.

item.name: Admin
item.description: Requires admin or super_admin token. Use {{adminToken}} or {{superAdminToken}} as appropriate.

request.description: Lists all profiles with status=submitted, oldest first.
Sets status=approved, visibility=public, searchable=true. Sends approval email.

body.description: tier must be: unverified | tier2_verified | tier1_managed_verified

request.description: Admin can suspend regular users. super_admin can suspend anyone including other admins.
Clears suspension and ensures is_active=true.
super_admin only. Creates a user that is immediately active — no email activation required. role: fighter | gym | coach | official | promoter | matchmaker | fan | admin
super_admin only. Permanently deletes the user account.
super_admin only. Changes the user's role. Their existing JWT stays valid until expiry.
